protein_name: Transcriptional inhibitor that binds to DNA sequence 5'-CACCT-3' in different promoters. Represses transcription of E-cadherin. Belongs to the delta-EF1/ZFH-1 C2H2-type zinc-finger family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Protein type: C2H2-type zinc finger protein; DNA-binding; Motility/polarity/chemotaxis; Transcription, coactivator/corepressor
